test.create_query: CREATE TABLE rand_unlimited_10m_8_large (key UInt8) Engine = Memory
CREATE TABLE rand_1k_10m_16_large (key UInt16) Engine = Memory
CREATE TABLE rand_100k_10m_16_large (key UInt16) Engine = Memory
CREATE TABLE rand_unlimited_10m_16_large (key UInt16) Engine = Memory
CREATE TABLE rand_1k_10m_32_large (key UInt32) Engine = Memory
CREATE TABLE rand_100k_10m_32_large (key UInt32) Engine = Memory
CREATE TABLE rand_unlimited_10m_32_large (key UInt32) Engine = Memory
CREATE TABLE rand_1k_10m_64_large (key UInt64) Engine = Memory
CREATE TABLE rand_100k_10m_64_large (key UInt64) Engine = Memory
CREATE TABLE rand_unlimited_10m_64_large (key UInt64) Engine = Memory
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO rand_unlimited_10m_8_large SELECT rand() AS x FROM zeros(140000000)
INSERT INTO rand_1k_10m_16_large SELECT rand()%1000 AS x FROM zeros(70000000)
INSERT INTO rand_100k_10m_16_large SELECT rand()%100000 AS x FROM zeros(35000000)
INSERT INTO rand_unlimited_10m_16_large SELECT rand() AS x FROM zeros(35000000)
INSERT INTO rand_1k_10m_32_large SELECT rand()%1000 AS x FROM zeros(130000000)
INSERT INTO rand_100k_10m_32_large SELECT rand()%100000 AS x FROM zeros(130000000)
INSERT INTO rand_unlimited_10m_32_large SELECT rand() AS x FROM zeros(130000000)
INSERT INTO rand_1k_10m_64_large SELECT rand()%1000 AS x FROM zeros(80000000)
INSERT INTO rand_100k_10m_64_large SELECT rand()%100000 AS x FROM zeros(80000000)
INSERT INTO rand_unlimited_10m_64_large SELECT rand() AS x FROM zeros(80000000)
test.query: SELECT sum(key) FROM (SELECT * FROM rand_unlimited_10m_8_large ORDER BY key)
SELECT sum(key) FROM (SELECT * FROM rand_1k_10m_16_large ORDER BY key)
SELECT sum(key) FROM (SELECT * FROM rand_100k_10m_16_large ORDER BY key)
SELECT sum(key) FROM (SELECT * FROM rand_unlimited_10m_16_large ORDER BY key)
SELECT sum(key) FROM (SELECT * FROM rand_1k_10m_32_large ORDER BY key)
SELECT sum(key) FROM (SELECT * FROM rand_1k_10m_64_large ORDER BY key)
